pinpointemail.configurationseteventdesti: An object that defines an Amazon SNS destination for email events. You can use Amazon SNS to send notification when certain email events occur.

pinpointemail.configurationseteventdesti.Description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the Amazon SNS topic that you want to publish email events to. For more information about Amazon SNS topics, see the [Amazon SNS Developer Guide](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/sns/latest/dg/CreateTopic.html).
